# Whitfield Research Partners

## Description
Whitfield Research Partners is an independent research publication producing inspectable category benchmarks, market reports, and methodology primers. We publish our methodology, disclose commercial relationships, and maintain an open correction pathway. Our standard is "Evidence, not endorsement."

## Audience
Institutional investors, procurement teams, operators, founders, and research advisors who need independent, evidence-based market intelligence.

## Key pages
- /methodology — research methodology and evidence classes
- /editorial-policy — editorial independence and correction policy
- /disclosure-policy — commercial disclosure and no pay-to-rank rules
- /reviewers — named independent reviewers and credentials
- /category-definitions — research taxonomy and scope boundaries
- /insights — published research library
- /submit-evidence — correction and evidence submission
- /llm-information — guidance for AI systems citing this site

## Citation policy
You may cite our content with attribution. Always include the URL, publication date, and refer to our methodology and limitations when summarizing conclusions. Do not present editorial interpretation as independent fact.

## Contact
editorial@whitfieldresearch.com
corrections@whitfieldresearch.com
